title.en: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
title.th: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees

summary.en: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.
